title: 信息图可视化设计
description: {   "type": "technical infographic",   "subject": "{argument name=\"subject matter\" default=\"digital photography process\"}",   "header": {     "title": "{argument name=\"main title\" default=\"一张照片诞生的因果链 THE CAUSAL CH
prompt_raw:
{
  "type": "technical infographic",
  "subject": "{argument name=\"subject matter\" default=\"digital photography process\"}",
  "header": {
    "title": "{argument name=\"main title\" default=\"一张照片诞生的因果链 THE CAUSAL CHAIN OF A PHOTOGRAPH\"}",
    "subtitle": "从世界，到图像 FROM WORLD TO IMAGE"
  },
  "centerpiece": {
    "description": "Exploded isometric view of a modern mirrorless camera",
    "model": "{argument name=\"camera model\" default=\"Canon EOS R5\"}",
    "labeled_parts_count": 12,
    "labeled_parts": [
      "EVF",
      "Body Structure",
      "Control Dials",
      "Thermal Design",
      "Optical Axis",
      "IBIS Stabilizer",
      "Shutter Unit",
      "Full-Frame Sensor",
      "{argument name=\"processor name\" default=\"DIGIC X Processor\"}",
      "Main PCB",
      "High-Speed Bus",
      "Card Slot"
    ]
  },
  "layout": {
    "left_column": {
      "description": "Chronological causal chain",
      "count": 13,
      "steps": [
        "01 REALITY EXISTS",
        "02 PHOTONS LEAVE THE WORLD",
        "03 LENS ACCEPTS & BENDS LIGHT",
        "04 APERTURE SELECTS",
        "05 SHUTTER CUTS TIME",
        "06 FOCUS SETS PRIORITY",
        "07 SENSOR RECEIVES EVENT",
        "08 LIGHT BECOMES CHARGE",
        "09 ANALOG READOUT",
        "10 A/D CONVERSION",
        "11 COMPUTATION RECONSTRUCTS",
        "12 IMAGE APPEARS",
        "13 MEMORY OUTLIVES"
      ]
    },
    "right_column": {
      "title": "八大模块 / 8 MODULES",
      "count": 8,
      "modules": [
        "1 ORIGIN OF LIGHT",
        "2 LENS SHAPES REALITY",
        "3 APERTURE & SHUTTER EDIT THE WORLD",
        "4 FOCUS DECIDES CLARITY",
        "5 SENSOR MEASURES LIGHT",
        "6 SIGNAL BORN & AMPLIFIED",
        "7 COMPUTATION BUILDS IMAGE",
        "8 FILE BECOMES MEMORY"
      ]
    },
    "side_diagrams": {
      "count": 7,
      "descriptions": [
        "Ray cone & image formation",
        "Aperture & depth of field",
        "Shutter & motion",
        "Focal plane & clarity",
        "Pixel structure",
        "Photoelectric conversion",
        "Analog signal waveform"
      ]
    },
    "footer": {
      "count": 5,
      "description": "Philosophical summary points"
    }
  },
  "style": "technical, precise, wireframe elements, glowing data lines, photorealistic camera components, clean typography, dual-language"
}
prompt_preview: {   "type": "technical infographic",   "subject": "{argument name=\"subject matter\" default=\"digital photography process\"}",   "header": {     "title": "{argument name=\"main title\" default=\"一张照片诞生的因果链 THE CAUSAL CH
prompt_display_cn:
案例「type」属于信息图/结构图。这是一张信息图/结构图类案例，重点不是单一画面主体，而是把主题内容拆成清晰模块，用标题、图标、箭头、分区、编号、标签和说明文字组织信息。适合改成知识科普、人物关系、流程图、城市地图、产品说明、攻略指南等高信息密度视觉。

原始提示词要点：这是一条结构化提示词，原文使用 JSON/参数协议描述画面。案例类型为“technical 信息图”，核心由 type, subject, header, centerpiece, layout, style 等部分组成。展示层建议不要直接暴露原始 JSON，而应转译为中文说明与可填空模板，方便用户理解画面结构、替换主题、复用版式。
prompt_template_cn:
制作一张【主题】的信息图/结构图。

画面定位：
面向【目标读者】，用于【使用场景】，整体要求信息清楚、层级明确、视觉有吸引力。

主体内容：
以【核心对象/中心主题】为视觉中心，周围分成【模块数量】个信息模块，分别展示【模块1】、【模块2】、【模块3】、【模块4】等内容。

版式结构：
采用【版式结构】，使用清晰的标题区、分区框、箭头连线、编号标签、图标和简短说明文字组织信息。重要内容要突出，次要内容保持整齐。

视觉风格：
整体风格为【视觉风格】，背景为【背景样式】，配色使用【主色调】，图形元素保持统一。

文字要求：
所有需要显示的文字使用【文字语言】，标题和标签清晰可读，避免乱码、错字和过度拥挤。

输出要求：
画面比例为【画面比例】，适合用于【发布渠道/用途】。
